name: architect-desktop-app
description: A personal desktop dashboard: todo, countdown days, timer and notes on a free canvas

scripts.app:install: CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --dir && rm -rf /Applications/Bloom.app && cp -R dist/mac-arm64/Bloom.app /Applications/ && xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Bloom.app
